---
title: "07 GEO Dataset Acquisition and Preprocessing"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)
library(GEOquery)
library(sva)
library(limma)

# Global Parameters
# Dataset assignment and batch correction parameters

# Data Download & Import
# Bulk download specified GSE datasets

# Data Analysis
# 1. Extract expression matrix and sample annotation information
# 2. Standardization and missing value processing
# 3. Batch effect correction via SVA
# 4. Classify count matrix, WGCNA matrix and validation matrix
# 5. Divide training set, internal validation set and external validation set

# Result Export
# Output standardized expression matrix and sample grouping file

# Result Description
# Explain dataset functions and preprocessing quality control standards
